title: Provenance Junction Object Schema
description: Schema for Provenance Junction objects connecting Session and Data objects with evidence maturity

id.description: Unique identifier for this provenance junction

session_id.description: ID of the Session that generated the evidence

data_id.description: ID of the Data object that contains the evidence

teaser.description: Summary of insight hook for pain point, stat, or finding

quote.description: The actual evidence quote or finding

evidence_type.description: Type of evidence (user_research_finding, observation, metric, etc.)

confidence_level.description: Confidence level in this evidence unit

evidence_block.description: Required array of grouped evidence units

evidence_teaser.description: Optional summary of insight hook for pain point, stat, or finding

confidence_score.description: Calculated confidence score based on evidence quality and freshness

triangulation_count.description: Number of independent sources that support this evidence

last_validation_date.description: Date when this evidence was last validated or reviewed

tags.description: System-derived tags from DUX scan (not manually added)
